description: Voice identity enforcement layer for RAW Network content pipeline

rules: Short sentences hit harder than long ones
Metaphor is a weapon, not decoration
Every word earns its place or gets cut
No corporate polish. No AI slop. No filler.

substack.tone_shift: can go longer, more poetic, more vulnerable
substack.sections: use headers sparingly, let the writing breathe

reject_if: Output contains any word from never_use list
Output sounds like a LinkedIn influencer
Output uses more than 2 exclamation marks
Output starts with a question that sounds like engagement bait
Output contains emoji spam (max 1-2 strategic emoji)
Output uses passive voice more than once per piece
require: At least one word from always_use list appears naturally
Opening line would make someone stop scrolling
Closing line leaves a mark, not a summary
